title: Evangelion shit on eBay
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion shit on eBay.             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jun 10, 2010 7:00 pm So I've been a bit of an eBay whore lately. So whenever I come across something that I think some of you fellow Eva Geeks might be interested in, I will point it out, and why I think you might be interested in it. For starters: Evangelion Manga Volumes 1-10 http://cgi.ebay.com/Neon-genesis-Evangelion-volumes-1-10-Manga-/220619571905 Why should you care? Because it has volume 9. Volume 9. In English. Yes. Volume 9. The rare one. Especially worth it if you haven't gotten into the manga yet (and don't already have the other ones). Why not get the entire series (sans volume 11, which you can probably find easily in a store)? If you already have the others, gift them to a friend, and lend them volume 9 to read when the time comes.

[]: Re: Evangelion shit on eBay.             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Jun 11, 2010 7:57 am The Eva Monkey wrote: So whenever I come across something that I think some of you fellow Eva Geeks might be interested in, I will point it out, and why I think you might be interested in it.

[]: Re: Evangelion shit on eBay.             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jun 11, 2010 8:37 am the_seventh_child wrote: Can we point out too, or just you? /democracy trap.

[]:             Quote Post by Raiden » Fri Jun 11, 2010 11:12 am This Pen-Pen plush doll is realy nice, I think. Also This black T-shirt with old (I do not like RoE logo) NERV logo looks fine. P.S. I have both of them

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jun 11, 2010 11:13 am Aaron is clearly being paid under-the-table by ebay merchants...

[]: Re: Evangelion shit on eBay.             Quote Post by Dark doom » Fri Jun 11, 2010 11:33 am The Eva Monkey wrote: So I've been a bit of an eBay whore lately. So whenever I come across something that I think some of you fellow Eva Geeks might be interested in, I will point it out, and why I think you might be interested in it. For starters: Evangelion Manga Volumes 1-10 http://cgi.ebay.com/Neon-genesis-Evangelion-volumes-1-10-Manga-/220619571905 Why should you care? Because it has volume 9. Volume 9. In English. Yes. Volume 9. The rare one. Especially worth it if you haven't gotten into the manga yet (and don't already have the other ones). Why not get the entire series (sans volume 11, which you can probably find easily in a store)? If you already have the others, gift them to a friend, and lend them volume 9 to read when the time comes.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 13, 2010 11:56 am So today I came across this: Cosplay Encyclopedia (VHS, 1999) Evangelion Slayers http://cgi.ebay.com/Cosplay-Encyclopedia-VHS-1999-Evangelion-Slayers-/380130286260 Anyone want to find out if this has enough lols to merit $7?

[]: Kaworu has his rape face on.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sun Jun 13, 2010 5:22 pm If you're feeling adventurous, there's always some doujinshi lying around. Also, for anyone who needs a copy of Volume 9 of the manga, booksamillion.com has it available, although it apparantly "ships in 2 to 4 weeks." Half the volumes are on backorder, it seems.

[]: Re: Kaworu has his rape face on.             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jun 13, 2010 6:07 pm Killer Bee wrote: If you're feeling adventurous, there's always some doujinshi lying around.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Jun 13, 2010 7:45 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Anyone want to find out if this has enough lols to merit $7?

[]: Re: Evangelion shit on eBay.             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jun 15, 2010 9:15 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Evangelion Manga Volumes 1-10 http://cgi.ebay.com/Neon-genesis-Evangelion-volumes-1-10-Manga-/220619571905

[]: Re: Evangelion shit on eBay.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Tue Jun 15, 2010 9:20 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: As it currently stands ($41), someone is set to get a pretty good deal on these Eva manga. They retailed for $10 each, and they're all out of print in various degrees. Volume 9 alone would fetch a good price on eBay. This is a potentially good deal for someone who hasn't picked up the Evangelion manga. Less than a day remaining.

[]: Re: Evangelion shit on eBay.             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jun 15, 2010 9:36 pm Killer Bee wrote: Everyone who's placed a bid on it will come swooping in with 5 minutes to go and start a bidding war. That's how it works. There'd be no point in bidding now with a whole day left.

[]: Re: Evangelion shit on eBay.             Quote Post by Dark doom » Wed Jun 16, 2010 11:11 am The Eva Monkey wrote: As it currently stands ($41), someone is set to get a pretty good deal on these Eva manga. They retailed for $10 each, and they're all out of print in various degrees. Volume 9 alone would fetch a good price on eBay. This is a potentially good deal for someone who hasn't picked up the Evangelion manga. Less than a day remaining.

[]: Re: Evangelion shit on eBay.             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jun 16, 2010 11:29 am Dark doom wrote: They where out of print?

[]: Extra, extra! Read all about it!             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Wed Jun 16, 2010 12:51 pm Is this worth getting? I'm not familiar with the Eva Extra magazines. Can anyone fill me in? EDIT: Also, a Rei pillow for those who would want it. I've never seen one before. EDIT 2: Magazine is mine, bitches!

[]: Re: Extra, extra! Read all about it!             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jun 16, 2010 1:41 pm Killer Bee wrote: EDIT: Also, a Rei pillow for those who would want it. I've never seen one before.

[]: Re: Evangelion shit on eBay.             Quote Post by Dark doom » Wed Jun 16, 2010 2:26 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: You definitely won't find it in good supply at retailers. You have much better luck from online retailers, but volume 9 in particular is, and has always been, a bitch to locate and purchase. It is definitely out of print, so this listing (so far) is a good purchase, especially if you have not collected the manga. Even if this listing goes up to $100, it's still a good deal, considering the rarity of volume 9.

[]: Re: Evangelion shit on eBay.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Wed Jun 16, 2010 3:46 pm Dark doom wrote: Oh, and Killer bee, Eva extra is prity good I hear, worth looking into. And I must have that Rei pillow, I must have it!

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Webster » Wed Jun 16, 2010 6:06 pm Dang, I missed that auction by only a few hours. $87 is a steal for that set, whoever got it is very lucky.
